func builtins() FuncMap {
	return FuncMap{
		"and":		and,
		"call":		emptyCall,
		"html":		HTMLEscaper,
		"index":	index,
		"slice":	slice,
		"js":		JSEscaper,
		"len":		length,
		"not":		not,
		"or":		or,
		"print":	fmt.Sprint,
		"printf":	fmt.Sprintf,
		"println":	fmt.Sprintln,
		"urlquery":	URLQueryEscaper,

		"eq":	eq,
		"ge":	ge,
		"gt":	gt,
		"le":	le,
		"lt":	lt,
		"ne":	ne,
	}
}
